MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Keith Velleca, Esq. (415-293-8048) for Plaintiff and opposing party Ayrie Aranda.
Ronald Arias, Esq. of Wright Filay & Zak (415-230-4350) for Defendant and moving party Mariners Pac 3 Holdings and BSI Financial Services.

Argued. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
DEFENDANTS MARINERS PAC 3 HOLDINGS, LLC and BSI FINANCIAL SERVICES INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is taken under submission. Defendant ordered to send links on cases cited during the haring by email. Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-16-2014 Continued To Oct-15-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTs MARINERS PAC 3 HOLDINGS, LLC and BSI FINANCIAL SERVICES INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to October 15, 2014. Moving party is ordered again (See CGC-13-528440 June 5, 2013 Minute Order) to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than September 22, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
